title: Automated notifications happen too quickly for item creation
excerpt: I have created an automation to alert the board members when a new item is created.  When I go to the board and create a new item, the automation sends out the alert before I even change the name of the item, so my board…

posts.author: Usernamegame (Jake N)
posts.cookedHtml: I have created an automation to alert the board members when a new item is created. When I go to the board and create a new item, the automation sends out the alert before I even change the name of the item, so my board members get notified that “New Task” has been created, which isn’t helpful. Any solutions or work arounds?

posts.author: carlo (Jose Carlo)
posts.cookedHtml: Also looking for a solution to this. Let me know if you found any workaround

posts.author: magic_maker (Mircea Clitan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
If you have any other column in the board that are modified by you, you can simply change the trigger. from when the item is created to when the column changes notify…
